name: @atrib/openinference-processor
description: OpenTelemetry SpanProcessor that consumes OpenInference-shaped spans and emits signed atrib records. Pattern #4 of atrib's six runtime integration patterns (spec §9). Transitively reaches every framework with OpenInference instrumentation: OpenAI Agents SDK, Claude Agent SDK, LangChain, Vercel AI, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, DSPy, MCP, Microsoft Agent Framework, Bedrock AgentCore, smolagents, Pydantic AI, Agno, and 20+ more (see https://github.com/Arize-ai/openinference).
author: atrib <hello@atrib.dev>
